subject: [PATCH v2 07/14] fuse: use named constants for io-uring iovec indices

reviews.author: Bernd Schubert
reviews.summary: Approved the patch, suggesting it should have been done from the beginning. Added Reviewed-by tag.

2026-04-02.patch_summary: This patch replaces magic indices 0 and 1 in the io-uring iovec array with named constants FUSE_URING_IOV_HEADERS and FUSE_URING_IOV_PAYLOAD, making the code self-documenting and preparing for future buffer ring support.
